checks.summary: The diff implements the requested client-side URMA data-plane failover: it adds a success-rate tracker, configurable threshold and minimum sample flags, records Set/Get URMA outcomes, triggers asynchronous worker switching with URMA_DATA_PLANE_FAILURE while keeping the current worker available on failure, documents the flags, and adds UT/ST coverage for tracker and failover behavior.

evidence.label: tracker-and-config
evidence.detail: src/datasystem/client/urma_success_rate_tracker.{h,cpp} add UrmaSuccessRateTracker with fixed-window success/failure counts, min-sample gating, strict threshold comparison, switch-in-progress CAS, failed-switch backoff, and reset behavior; common_gflag_define.cpp/common_gflags.h/common_gflags_validate.cpp/flags.h add and validate urma_failover_success_rate_ratio and urma_failover_min_sample_count as dynamic client flags.

evidence.label: client-wiring
evidence.detail: client_worker_common_api.{h,cpp} adds RecordUrmaDataPlaneResult, FinishUrmaDataPlaneSwitchAttempt, and SetUrmaDataPlaneFailureCallback; client_worker_base_api.cpp records client-to-worker UB write success/failure; client_worker_remote_api.cpp records Get-side K_URMA_ERROR and TCP fallback payload cases as URMA data-plane results.

evidence.label: failover-semantics
evidence.detail: listen_worker.h adds URMA_DATA_PLANE_FAILURE; object_client_impl.{h,cpp} configures a weak callback per worker API, submits async switch work, ignores stale callbacks, calls SwitchWorkerNode with URMA_DATA_PLANE_FAILURE, and treats that reason as keepCurrentWorker=true so failed switches preserve current-worker availability.

evidence.label: tests-and-docs
evidence.detail: tests/ut/client/urma_success_rate_tracker_test.cpp covers full-window gating, min sample count, strict threshold, disable/reset, backoff, duplicate suppression, hot min-sample updates, healthy reset, zero window, and concurrent boundary behavior; tests/st/client/kv_cache/kv_client_urma_failover_test.cpp covers local UDS no-switch, remote Set/Get URMA failure switch, K_URMA_ERROR, failed switch keeping current worker, healthy-window backoff reset, min-sample and threshold-disable behavior, dynamic config updates, and local switch-back; docs/source_zh_cn/appendix/client_env_guide.md documents the new client runtime parameters.
